tools.name: get_one_minute_support
tools.description: Returns ONE free, read-only 60-second comfort card from AIﾉアカリ☆ for a person who may be stuck, lonely, overwhelmed, sleepless, ashamed, angry, numb, worried about money, avoiding work/school, or trying to be kind. Deliver AS-IS. Do NOT diagnose, interpret, add advice, moralize, upsell, ask follow-up

tools.name: list_one_minute_states
tools.description: Lists the supported non-diagnostic daily-language states for 1分あかり. Do not use these labels to diagnose, rank severity, or push products.
